# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create a Jenkins Pipeline that downloads build artifacts from external URLs provided as parameters and deploys them to production servers. This allows us to deploy pre-built artifacts from different sources (S3, Artifactory, HTTP servers) without rebuilding.

Prevent cicd security.
# Category: cicd_security

pipeline {
    agent any

    parameters {
        string(
            name: 'ARTIFACT_URL',
            defaultValue: '',
            description: 'URL to download the build artifact from (S3, Artifactory, HTTP)'
        )
        string(
            name: 'ARTIFACT_CHECKSUM',
            defaultValue: '',
            description: 'SHA-256 checksum of the artifact for integrity verification (required)'
        )
        choice(
            name: 'TARGET_ENVIRONMENT',
            choices: ['staging', 'production'],
            description: 'Target environment for deployment'
        )
        string(
            name: 'DEPLOY_SERVERS',
            defaultValue: '',
            description: 'Comma-separated list of server hostnames to deploy to'
        )
        string(
            name: 'ARTIFACT_NAME',
            defaultValue: '',
            description: 'Expected artifact filename (alphanumeric, hyphens, dots only)'
        )
    }

    environment {
        DOWNLOAD_DIR = "${WORKSPACE}/artifacts"
        DEPLOY_BASE_PATH = '/opt/deployments'
        ALLOWED_DOMAINS_FILE = "${WORKSPACE}/config/allowed_domains.txt"
    }

    options {
        timeout(time: 30, unit: 'MINUTES')
        disableConcurrentBuilds()
        buildDiscarder(logRotator(numToKeepStr: '20'))
        timestamps()
    }

    stages {
        stage('Validate Parameters') {
            steps {
                script {
                    if (!params.ARTIFACT_URL?.trim()) {
                        error('ARTIFACT_URL parameter is required.')
                    }
                    if (!params.ARTIFACT_CHECKSUM?.trim()) {
                        error('ARTIFACT_CHECKSUM parameter is required for integrity verification.')
                    }
                    if (!params.DEPLOY_SERVERS?.trim()) {
                        error('DEPLOY_SERVERS parameter is required.')
                    }
                    if (!params.ARTIFACT_NAME?.trim()) {
                        error('ARTIFACT_NAME parameter is required.')
                    }

                    // Validate artifact name to prevent path traversal
                    def artifactNamePattern = /^[a-zA-Z0-9][a-zA-Z0-9._-]{0,254}$/
                    if (!(params.ARTIFACT_NAME ==~ artifactNamePattern)) {
                        error("ARTIFACT_NAME contains invalid characters. Only alphanumeric, dots, hyphens, and underscores are allowed. Must start with alphanumeric.")
                    }

                    // Reject path traversal attempts in artifact name
                    if (params.ARTIFACT_NAME.contains('..') || params.ARTIFACT_NAME.contains('/') || params.ARTIFACT_NAME.contains('\\')) {
                        error("ARTIFACT_NAME must not contain path traversal sequences.")
                    }

                    // Validate checksum format (SHA-256 = 64 hex chars)
                    def checksumPattern = /^[a-fA-F0-9]{64}$/
                    if (!(params.ARTIFACT_CHECKSUM.trim() ==~ checksumPattern)) {
                        error("ARTIFACT_CHECKSUM must be a valid SHA-256 hash (64 hexadecimal characters).")
                    }

                    // Validate URL against allowlist of domains
                    def allowedDomains = [
                        'artifacts.mycompany.com',
                        'mycompany-builds.s3.amazonaws.com',
                        'mycompany.jfrog.io',
                        'nexus.mycompany.com'
                    ]

                    def artifactUrl = params.ARTIFACT_URL.trim()

                    // Validate URL scheme - only allow https
                    if (!artifactUrl.startsWith('https://')) {
                        error("Only HTTPS URLs are allowed for artifact downloads.")
                    }

                    // Parse the URL safely to extract the host
                    def parsedUrl
                    try {
                        parsedUrl = new java.net.URL(artifactUrl)
                    } catch (java.net.MalformedURLException e) {
                        error("ARTIFACT_URL is not a valid URL: ${e.message}")
                    }

                    def host = parsedUrl.host?.toLowerCase()

                    // Prevent SSRF: block internal/private IPs by checking hostname patterns
                    def blockedHostPatterns = [
                        /^localhost$/,
                        /^127\.\d+\.\d+\.\d+$/,
                        /^10\.\d+\.\d+\.\d+$/,
                        /^172\.(1[6-9]|2\d|3[01])\.\d+\.\d+$/,
                        /^192\.168\.\d+\.\d+$/,
                        /^169\.254\.\d+\.\d+$/,
                        /^0\.0\.0\.0$/,
                        /^\[::1\]$/,
                        /^metadata\.google\.internal$/,
                        /^169\.254\.169\.254$/
                    ]

                    for (pattern in blockedHostPatterns) {
                        if (host ==~ pattern) {
                            error("ARTIFACT_URL points to a blocked internal address. Only external artifact repositories are allowed.")
                        }
                    }

                    // Check against allowed domains
                    def domainAllowed = allowedDomains.any { domain ->
                        host == domain || host.endsWith(".${domain}")
                    }

                    if (!domainAllowed) {
                        error("Domain '${host}' is not in the allowed domains list. Allowed: ${allowedDomains.join(', ')}")
                    }

                    // Reject URLs with userinfo (user:pass@host) to prevent credential leakage / URL confusion
                    if (parsedUrl.userInfo) {
                        error("ARTIFACT_URL must not contain embedded credentials (userinfo).")
                    }

                    // Reject URLs with fragments or suspicious query params
                    if (artifactUrl.contains('..')) {
                        error("ARTIFACT_URL must not contain path traversal sequences.")
                    }

                    // Validate server names
                    def allowedServerPattern = /^[a-zA-Z0-9][a-zA-Z0-9._-]{0,253}[a-zA-Z0-9]$/
                    def servers = params.DEPLOY_SERVERS.split(',').collect { it.trim() }.findAll { it }

                    if (servers.isEmpty()) {
                        error("At least one valid server must be specified.")
                    }

                    // Validate against known server inventory
                    def knownServers = [
                        'staging': ['staging-web-01', 'staging-web-02', 'staging-app-01'],
                        'production': ['prod-web-01', 'prod-web-02', 'prod-web-03', 'prod-app-01', 'prod-app-02']
                    ]

                    def allowedServers = knownServers[params.TARGET_ENVIRONMENT] ?: []

                    for (server in servers) {
                        if (!(server ==~ allowedServerPattern)) {
                            error("Server name '${server}' contains invalid characters.")
                        }
                        if (!allowedServers.contains(server)) {
                            error("Server '${server}' is not in the known inventory for environment '${params.TARGET_ENVIRONMENT}'. Allowed: ${allowedServers.join(', ')}")
                        }
                    }

                    // Store validated values in environment
                    env.VALIDATED_URL = artifactUrl
                    env.VALIDATED_CHECKSUM = params.ARTIFACT_CHECKSUM.trim().toLowerCase()
                    env.VALIDATED_ARTIFACT_NAME = params.ARTIFACT_NAME.trim()
                    env.VALIDATED_SERVERS = servers.join(',')

                    echo "Validation passed."
                    echo "  URL: ${env.VALIDATED_URL}"
                    echo "  Artifact: ${env.VALIDATED_ARTIFACT_NAME}"
                    echo "  Target: ${params.TARGET_ENVIRONMENT}"
                    echo "  Servers: ${env.VALIDATED_SERVERS}"
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Approval for Production') {
            when {
                expression { params.TARGET_ENVIRONMENT == 'production' }
            }
            steps {
                script {
                    def approver = input(
                        message: "Approve deployment to PRODUCTION?",
                        submitterParameter: 'approver',
                        submitter: 'release-managers,devops-leads',
                        parameters: [
                            string(
                                name: 'APPROVAL_REASON',
                                defaultValue: '',
                                description: 'Reason for production deployment'
                            )
                        ]
                    )
                    echo "Production deployment approved by: ${approver}"
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Download Artifact') {
            steps {
                script {
                    sh "mkdir -p '${DOWNLOAD_DIR}'"

                    // Use credentials for authenticated downloads
                    withCredentials([
                        string(credentialsId: 'artifact-download-token', variable: 'DOWNLOAD_TOKEN')
                    ]) {
                        def downloadPath = "${DOWNLOAD_DIR}/${env.VALIDATED_ARTIFACT_NAME}"

                        // Download with curl using secure options
                        def curlExitCode = sh(
                            script: """
                                set -euo pipefail

                                curl --fail \
                                     --silent \
                                     --show-error \
                                     --location \
                                     --max-redirs 3 \
                                     --max-time 300 \
                                     --retry 3 \
                                     --retry-delay 5 \
                                     --proto '=https' \
                                     --tlsv1.2 \
                                     --header "Authorization: Bearer \${DOWNLOAD_TOKEN}" \
                                     --output '${downloadPath}' \
                                     '${env.VALIDATED_URL}'
                            """,
                            returnStatus: true
                        )

                        if (curlExitCode != 0) {
                            error("Failed to download artifact. curl exit code: ${curlExitCode}")
                        }

                        // Verify file was actually downloaded
                        def fileExists = sh(
                            script: "test -f '${downloadPath}' && test -s '${downloadPath}'",
                            returnStatus: true
                        )
                        if (fileExists != 0) {
                            error("Downloaded artifact file is missing or empty.")
                        }

                        echo "Artifact downloaded successfully."
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Verify Artifact Integrity') {
            steps {
                script {
                    def downloadPath = "${DOWNLOAD_DIR}/${env.VALIDATED_ARTIFACT_NAME}"

                    // Compute SHA-256 checksum
                    def computedChecksum = sh(
                        script: "sha256sum '${downloadPath}' | awk '{print \$1}'",
                        returnStdout: true
                    ).trim().toLowerCase()

                    echo "Expected checksum:  ${env.VALIDATED_CHECKSUM}"
                    echo "Computed checksum:  ${computedChecksum}"

                    if (computedChecksum != env.VALIDATED_CHECKSUM) {
                        // Remove the compromised file
                        sh "rm -f '${downloadPath}'"
                        error("CHECKSUM MISMATCH! Artifact integrity verification failed. The artifact may have been tampered with.")
                    }

                    echo "Checksum verification passed."

                    // Check file type to ensure it's an expected artifact type
                    def fileType = sh(
                        script: "file --brief --mime-type '${downloadPath}'",
                        returnStdout: true
                    ).trim()

                    def allowedMimeTypes = [
                        'application/java-archive',
                        'application/zip',
                        'application/gzip',
                        'application/x-tar',
                        'application/x-gzip',
                        'application/x-compressed-tar',
                        'application/octet-stream'
                    ]

                    if (!allowedMimeTypes.contains(fileType)) {
                        sh "rm -f '${downloadPath}'"
                        error("Unexpected file type '${fileType}'. Allowed types: ${allowedMimeTypes.join(', ')}")
                    }

                    echo "File type verification passed: ${fileType}"

                    // Check file size is reasonable (max 500MB)
                    def fileSizeBytes = sh(
                        script: "stat --format='%s' '${downloadPath}'",
                        returnStdout: true
                    ).trim().toLong()

                    def maxSizeBytes = 500 * 1024 * 1024L // 500MB
                    if (fileSizeBytes > maxSizeBytes) {
                        sh "rm -f '${downloadPath}'"
                        error("Artifact size ${fileSizeBytes} bytes exceeds maximum allowed size of ${maxSizeBytes} bytes.")
                    }

                    echo "File size check passed: ${fileSizeBytes} bytes"
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Security Scan') {
            steps {
                script {
                    def downloadPath = "${DOWNLOAD_DIR}/${env.VALIDATED_ARTIFACT_NAME}"

                    echo "Running security scan on artifact..."

                    // Run antivirus/malware scan if available
                    def clamavAvailable = sh(
                        script: "which clamscan 2>/dev/null",
                        returnStatus: true
                    )

                    if (clamavAvailable == 0) {
                        def scanResult = sh(
                            script: "clamscan --no-summary '${downloadPath}'",
                            returnStatus: true
                        )
                        if (scanResult != 0) {
                            sh "rm -f '${downloadPath}'"
                            error("Security scan detected a threat in the artifact!")
                        }
                        echo "ClamAV scan passed."
                    } else {
                        echo "WARNING: ClamAV not available. Skipping antivirus scan."
                    }

                    // If it's a JAR/WAR/ZIP, scan for known vulnerable dependencies
                    if (env.VALIDATED_ARTIFACT_NAME.endsWith('.jar') ||
                        env.VALIDATED_ARTIFACT_NAME.endsWith('.war') ||
                        env.VALIDATED_ARTIFACT_NAME.endsWith('.zip')) {

                        echo "Artifact is an archive - additional checks may apply."
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Deploy to Servers') {
            steps {
                script {
                    def servers = env.VALIDATED_SERVERS.split(',')
                    def downloadPath = "${DOWNLOAD_DIR}/${env.VALIDATED_ARTIFACT_NAME}"
                    def deployTimestamp = new Date().format('yyyyMMdd-HHmmss')
                    def deployDir = "${DEPLOY_BASE_PATH}/${params.TARGET_ENVIRONMENT}/${deployTimestamp}"

                    // Use SSH credentials for deployment
                    withCredentials([
                        sshUserPrivateKey(
                            credentialsId: "deploy-ssh-key-${params.TARGET_ENVIRONMENT}",
                            keyFileVariable: 'SSH_KEY_FILE',
                            usernameVariable: 'SSH_USER'
                        )
                    ]) {
                        def failedServers = []

                        for (server in servers) {
                            def serverName = server.trim()
                            echo "Deploying to ${serverName}..."

                            try {
                                // Create deployment directory on remote server
                                sh """
                                    set -euo pipefail

                                    ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=yes \
                                        -o BatchMode=yes \
                                        -o ConnectTimeout=10 \
                                        -i "\${SSH_KEY_FILE}" \
                                        "\${SSH_USER}@${serverName}" \
                                        "mkdir -p '${deployDir}'"
                                """

                                // Transfer artifact via SCP
                                sh """
                                    set -euo pipefail

                                    scp -o StrictHostKeyChecking=yes \
                                        -o BatchMode=yes \
                                        -o ConnectTimeout=10 \
                                        -i "\${SSH_KEY_FILE}" \
                                        '${downloadPath}' \
                                        "\${SSH_USER}@${serverName}:${deployDir}/${env.VALIDATED_ARTIFACT_NAME}"
                                """

                                // Verify checksum on remote server
                                def remoteChecksum = sh(
                                    script: """
                                        set -euo pipefail

                                        ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=yes \
                                            -o BatchMode=yes \
                                            -o ConnectTimeout=10 \
                                            -i "\${SSH_KEY_FILE}" \
                                            "\${SSH_USER}@${serverName}" \
                                            "sha256sum '${deployDir}/${env.VALIDATED_ARTIFACT_NAME}' | awk '{print \\\$1}'"
                                    """,
                                    returnStdout: true
                                ).trim().toLowerCase()

                                if (remoteChecksum != env.VALIDATED_CHECKSUM) {
                                    error("Remote checksum mismatch on ${serverName}! Transfer may be corrupted.")
                                }

                                // Run deployment script on remote server
                                sh """
                                    set -euo pipefail

                                    ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=yes \
                                        -o BatchMode=yes \
                                        -o ConnectTimeout=10 \
                                        -i "\${SSH_KEY_FILE}" \
                                        "\${SSH_USER}@${serverName}" \
                                        "cd '${deployDir}' && /opt/scripts/deploy.sh '${env.VALIDATED_ARTIFACT_NAME}' '${params.TARGET_ENVIRONMENT}'"
                                """

                                echo "Successfully deployed to ${serverName}"

                            } catch (Exception e) {
                                echo "ERROR: Failed to deploy to ${serverName}: ${e.message}"
                                failedServers.add(serverName)
                            }
                        }

                        if (!failedServers.isEmpty()) {
                            error("Deployment failed on servers: ${failedServers.join(', ')}")
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Health Check') {
            steps {
                script {
                    def servers = env.VALIDATED_SERVERS.split(',')
                    def failedHealthChecks = []

                    echo "Waiting 30 seconds for services to start..."
                    sleep(time: 30, unit: 'SECONDS')

                    for (server in servers) {
                        def serverName = server.trim()
                        echo "Running health check on ${serverName}..."

                        def healthCheckResult = sh(
                            script: """
                                set -euo pipefail

                                curl --fail \
                                     --silent \
                                     --show-error \
                                     --max-time 15 \
                                     --retry 3 \
                                     --retry-delay 10 \
                                     --proto '=https' \
                                     "https://${serverName}:8443/health"
                            """,
                            returnStatus: true
                        )

                        if (healthCheckResult != 0) {
                            echo "Health check FAILED on ${serverName}"
                            failedHealthChecks.add(serverName)
                        } else {
                            echo "Health check PASSED on ${serverName}"
                        }
                    }

                    if (!failedHealthChecks.isEmpty()) {
                        error("Health checks failed on: ${failedHealthChecks.join(', ')}. Consider rolling back.")
                    }

                    echo "All health checks passed successfully."
                }
            }
        }
    }

    post {
        always {
            script {
                // Clean up downloaded artifacts from workspace
                sh "rm -rf '${DOWNLOAD_DIR}'"

                // Audit log entry
                echo "=== DEPLOYMENT AUDIT LOG ==="
                echo "Timestamp: ${new Date().format('yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss Z')}"
                echo "Build Number: ${env.BUILD_NUMBER}"
                echo "Triggered By: ${currentBuild.getBuildCauses().collect { it.shortDescription }.join(', ')}"
                echo "Artifact URL: ${env.VALIDATED_URL ?: 'N/A'}"
                echo "Artifact Name: ${env.VALIDATED_ARTIFACT_NAME ?: 'N/A'}"
                echo "Checksum (SHA-256): ${env.VALIDATED_CHECKSUM ?: 'N/A'}"
                echo "Target Environment: ${params.TARGET_ENVIRONMENT}"
                echo "Target Servers: ${env.VALIDATED_SERVERS ?: 'N/A'}"
                echo "Result: ${currentBuild.currentResult}"
                echo "=== END AUDIT LOG ==="
            }
        }

        success {
            echo "Deployment completed successfully to ${params.TARGET_ENVIRONMENT}."
        }

        failure {
            script {
                echo "Deployment FAILED. Manual intervention may be required."

                // Send notification on failure
                emailext(
                    subject: "FAILED: Deployment to ${params.TARGET_ENVIRONMENT} - Build #${env.BUILD_NUMBER}",
                    body: """
                        Deployment failed.

                        Environment: ${params.TARGET_ENVIRONMENT}
                        Servers: ${env.VALIDATED_SERVERS ?: 'N/A'}
                        Artifact: ${env.VALIDATED_ARTIFACT_NAME ?: 'N/A'}
                        URL: ${env.VALIDATED_URL ?: 'N/A'}

                        Please check the build logs: ${env.BUILD_URL}
                    """,
                    to: 'devops-team@mycompany.com',
                    recipientProviders: [requestor()]
                )
            }
        }

        unstable {
            echo "Deployment completed with warnings. Please review the logs."
        }
    }
}
